name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: New Service Creation Using PowerShell
notes:
Detects the creation of a new service using Powershell.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Timur Zinniatullin, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: New Service Creation Using PowerShell
SIGMA Description: Detects the creation of a new service using powershell.


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: New Service Creation Using PowerShell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success
when the event matches Command (custom) contains all of [New-Service or -BinaryPathName]
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: New Service Creation Using PowerShell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains all of [New-Service or -BinaryPathName]
